welcome_text:
Before you start using the tools, please read our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

By using the application, you accept the data processing rules for anonymization purposes.
footer_text: © 2026 LLM‑Router Anonymizer — Privacy in AI Communication
anon_sub: Remove sensitive data before sending text to the AI model.
result_placeholder: Result will appear here after processing...
chat_empty_text:
Start a conversation:
Ctrl+Enter sends
Ctrl+/ history
Ctrl+S export
Ctrl+L new chat
prompt_summarize_text: Summarize the above conversation in 3 points:
prompt_fix_text: Correct grammatical and stylistic errors in the following text:
prompt_explain_text: Explain this to me like I'm 5 years old:
prompt_code_text: Analyze the following code for performance and security:
privacy_warning_text: You have just disabled data masking!
privacy_warning_desc: By selecting "No anonymization", all your messages will be sent to the AI model in plain text. This means sensitive data like names, emails, and phones will be transmitted to the provider.
privacy_page_sub: Information about how we treat your data and what we store in your browser.
privacy_proc_text: The LLM-Router Anonymizer application acts as an intermediate interface (proxy). The main goal is to remove sensitive data before it is sent to AI models.
privacy_proc_highlight: Key rule: The application has no own user database or content logs. All texts are processed in RAM.
privacy_cookies_text: To ensure a convenient user experience, the application uses two mechanisms:
privacy_cookies_session: Flask Sessions (Cookies): We use encrypted session cookies to store current chat history.
privacy_cookies_local: LocalStorage: We store theme preferences, conversation list, and encrypted backups here.
privacy_external_text: Depending on the algorithm, your data is sent to PII Service and LLM-Router.
privacy_storage_text: We strictly adhere to a zero-retention policy for processed content. Once a text is anonymized or a chat response is generated, the data is immediately discarded from our servers. We do not keep logs, backups, or archives of your conversations.
privacy_security_text: All data transmissions are encrypted via HTTPS. The application does not collect IP addresses, device fingerprints, or any personally identifiable information (PII) beyond what is strictly necessary for the session.
privacy_risk_text: You are solely responsible for the data you input. Disabling anonymization features transfers full liability for data exposure to you. Always exercise caution when dealing with personal, financial, or medical data.
terms_page_sub: Rules for using the LLM-Router Anonymizer tool
terms_sec1_text: The LLM-Router Anonymizer is a web application used to mask sensitive data in text before sending it to language models (LLM).
terms_sec2_text: The user is fully responsible for the content of the data sent.
terms_sec2_li1: Masking algorithms may not detect 100% of sensitive data.
terms_sec2_li2: Disabling anonymization causes data to be sent in plain text.
terms_sec2_li3: Data may be processed by external AI model providers.
terms_sec2_warning: WARNING: The application does not guarantee full GDPR compliance if masking is consciously disabled.
terms_sec3_text: The application operates in a "stateless" model. Texts are not saved in a database on the server.
terms_sec4_text: Using the service is equivalent to accepting these terms and the privacy policy.
terms_sec5_text: While we employ industry-standard encryption and masking algorithms, no system is completely immune to vulnerabilities. By using this service, you acknowledge that you are using it at your own risk. We are not liable for any data breaches or losses resulting from the use of third-party AI models or unforeseen technical failures.
terms_sec6_text: The application is provided 'as is'. We do not guarantee uninterrupted operation or 100% accuracy of anonymization. Users must independently verify the effectiveness of data masking before sending sensitive information to external services.
